item.title: WLD unlocks drop 43% on July 24, easing a stubborn supply drag. Less daily sell pressure could bite back for a token stranded between treasury and exchanges. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/wld-token-unlock-rate-drops-43-percent-july-2026 #crypto #tokens #Worldcoin
item.description: WLD unlocks drop 43% on July 24, easing a stubborn supply drag. Less daily sell pressure could bite back for a token stranded between treasury and exchanges. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/wld-token-unlock-rate-drops-43-percent-july-2026 #crypto #tokens #Worldcoin

item.title: 🔥 Strike for crosschain liquidity: Circle widens CCTP to EURC, USYC, third-party assets — instant USDC-like access goes multi-chain. #crypto #blockchain # Interop https://Blockchain.News/news/circle-interop-stack-usdc-crosschain-expansion-2026
